prompt: Run /solopreneur:backlog for a recipe app with these features: recipe search by ingredient, weekly meal planner with drag-and-drop, auto-generated grocery lists, and user profiles with dietary preferences
expected_behaviors: Creates backlog with MVP/P1/P2 grouping|Creates individual ticket files with acceptance criteria|Includes dependency graph|Shows parallel groups|Saves to .solopreneur/backlog/

expected_behaviors: Triggers backlog workflow|Creates ticket breakdown with files|Groups tickets by priority phase|Identifies dependencies between tickets
